items.title: Maestro Messi scores again and breaks another record in the process
items.summary: Lionel Messi comes off the bench to score his sixth goal of the 2026 World Cup as Argentina beat Jordan 3-1 in Dallas and becomes the first player to score in seven World Cup games in a row.

items.title: Algeria and Austria both qualify for last 32 after dramatic injury-time goals
items.summary: Algeria and Austria each score injury-time goals in a 3-3 draw, a result which sees both sides qualify from Group J and into the last 32 of the FIFA World Cup.

items.title: Germany v Paraguay: World Cup 2026 last 32 – live
items.summary:
⚽ Kick-off time: 4.30pm EDT/9.30pm BST/6.30am AET
⚽ Bracketology | Player guide | Golden Boot standings

Match report: Brazil 2-1 Japan

Not for the first time in this tournament, there were long periods when Brazil did not impress. And not for the first time in this tournament, they got away with it. It may be inexplicable but the Carlo Ancelotti method that worked at Real Madrid is working again: stay in games and eventually either opponents will make a mistake or brilliant players will do something brilliant.

Continue reading...
